rows.label: tev024701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev024701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Samanya about the industrial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Samanya if she has any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Samanya about the west gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Samanya about her experience with the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev024701_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Samanya about the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Samanya if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Samanya what she intends to do next.

rows.label: tev024701_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Samanya about recent developments.

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0001
rows.name:
If you ride that elevator over there to the top,
you'll find a beautiful overlook of the entire city.
Have you been up there yet? It's pretty incredible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0002
rows.name:
Whenever I see NLA's strength and beauty
unfold before me like that, it always inspires
me to work that much harder at my job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0003
rows.name:
I want to make NLA every bit the
city the real Los Angeles was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'll do my part, but I'll be counting
on you BLADEs to protect this city
and the bright future it holds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0008
rows.name:
BLADEs have found shipping
containers and debris from the
White Whale scattered all over Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0009
rows.name:
I helped build the White Whale, you know.
And watching those xenoforms send it
crashing down in pieces was...horrible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0010
rows.name:
It was like my own limbs
were being torn off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0011
rows.name:
But seeing its remnants be
recovered and recycled has
helped to heal the wound somewhat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you have business outside the city, I
hope you'll help us find the remains of the
ship that we spent so many years building.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0020
rows.name:
They've finally reopened the west gate.
Now we can come and go without having
to pass through the emergency exit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0021
rows.name:
What a relief! Bringing materials
into the city without an operational
west gate has been a major hassle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG0022
rows.name:
If you're going to do any exploring to the west,
you should head straight out the gate from now
on. It's much more convenient that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0027
rows.name:
A Ma-non named Jubietta showed
up at my door and told me she
wanted to work with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0028
rows.name:
She said that back in Valley of Oblivion,
she was rescued by a human named [ST:playername ], and
this was her way of saying thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0029
rows.name:
But after every 15 or so minutes
of work, she always gets tired
and takes a "pizza break."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0030
rows.name:
If she's doing this out of gratitude,
you'd think she'd put a little
more effort into the work...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0035
rows.name:
The White Whale was equipped with a high-powered
energy shield designed to protect the entirety of
the Habitat, as this residential unit was known.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0036
rows.name:
If we still had that, there's
no way the enemy could have
gotten in here so easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0037
rows.name:
But if wishes were horses, beggars
would ride, eh? ...That's a weird
saying, now that I think about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0038
rows.name:
Anyway, all we can do is try to compensate for such
losses as best we can. So I'm going to make sure to
get those defensive walls back in perfect condition![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0039
rows.name:
Still, the best way to compensate for the shield's
absence is to have you BLADEs remove the threat of
the Growth completely. I wish you the best of luck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0045
rows.name:
There's been a rash of incidents involving the
sudden disappearance of trash that had been stored
at base camps throughout Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0046
rows.name:
Of course, since it's only
garbage that's being taken,
there's no real harm done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0047
rows.name:
Still, we've heard disturbing reports
that masked xenoforms have been
spotted...running off with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0048
rows.name:
I worry that if we don't get to the bottom
of this soon, it might develop into
something that actually IS a problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0049
rows.name:
We may need to install more data probes throughout
Primordial Wilderness in hopes of getting footage
of one of these incidents as it happens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0055
rows.name:
The threat posed by the Growth
has been negated, and the Central
Life has been recovered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0056
rows.name:
The time has finally come to turn our
attention to building a sustainable
life for ourselves here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0057
rows.name:
This would be so much easier if the White Whale
had been able to survive its crash landing intact.
But there's no use crying over spilled milk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024701_MSG0058
rows.name:
With the assistance of the Ma-non, I'm
confident that we'll be able to build
a comfortable city for ourselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG1001
rows.name:
It's well established that the fumes
emitted by painting and waterproofing
are not good for our Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG1002
rows.name:
It's been difficult finding
ways to protect our laborers
from their deleterious effects.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG1003
rows.name:
Fortunately, the Zaruboggan
have volunteered to help by
detoxifying things every night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG1004
rows.name:
I am in awe of the strange powers they possess. No
matter how tough the job, they always manage to have
it completely detoxified by the next morning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024701_MSG1005
rows.name:
How I wish Jubietta could learn from their
diligence instead of spending most of her
workday eating one pizza after another.[ST:wait ]
